TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Calasiv, title = Calasiv, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calasiv} }

S.FORM: = Calasiv = Gaga mniq Pingtung Rayyisyang ka alang Calasiv. 157 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 538 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 514 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 24 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan89%, Amis1%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%. Pusu nniqan alang Hangan Calasiv nii o niqan bi pahung na snaw msa. Nniqan alang Nuysan Pintung nsgan Rayyi alang Calasiv. Nniqan gasuc Ga mniq nsgan ruwan ksska mpitu alang ka alang Calasiv, hunac o lutuc alang Wenre, lutuc alang Rayyi ka hraan hidaw, kssiyaw alang Yirin ka daya hraan hidaw, lutuc alang Kuro ka gqiyan hidaw. Pgkla patas cyawtung Ppanun rulu:Kndadax sngyan rulu qrngul ppanan basu Pingtung quri Rayyi, dhuq do priyux haya musa alang. Quri Pingtung:Tay yi syen-Nsgan Sinpi, quri saw Syangtan, lutuc dgiyaq kungru kika dhuq da. Quri Kawcyung:Nanerkaw-Tucing Nancwo cyawryodaw. Sjiqan klgan nealang Seejiq Paywan. Djiyun kari Kari Paywan ni kari tlug. Snhiyun cungcyaw Tyencucyaw. Pnaah alang Minkwo 42 hngkawas kndadax (Carasywo),(Cyaraafus)tnhjil hini ni pnhyugan kingal alang. Kika balay bi alang Paywan. Mniq gqiyan hidaw ssiyaw yayung mdudul gggiyaq, lutuc hunac alang Wenre, lutuc gqiyan hidaw alang Kuro, daya hraan hidaw ni ssiyaw alang Yirin. Pgkla patas rmigaw
S.PHON: = ʦalasi* = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ ɾajjisjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦalasi*. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, amis*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ ħaŋan ʦalasi* nii o niqan bi paħuŋ na snaw msa. nniqan alaŋ nujsan pintuŋ nsgan ɾajji alaŋ ʦalasi*. nniqan gasuʦ ga mniq nsgan ɾuwan ksska mpitu alaŋ ka alaŋ ʦalasi*, ħunaʦ o lutuʦ alaŋ wənɾə, lutuʦ alaŋ ɾajji ka ħɾaan ħidaw, kssijaw alaŋ jiɾin ka daja ħɾaan ħidaw, lutuʦ alaŋ kuɾo ka gqijan ħidaw. pgkla patas ʦjawtuŋ ppanun ɾulu:kndadax sŋjan ɾulu qɾŋul ppanan basu piŋtuŋ quɾi ɾajji, dħuq do pɾijux ħaja musa alaŋ. quɾi piŋtuŋ:taj ji sjən-nsgan sinpi, quɾi saw sjaŋtan, lutuʦ dgijaq kuŋɾu kika dħuq da. quɾi kawʦjuŋ:nanəɾkaw-tuʦiŋ nanʦwo ʦjawɾjodaw. sɟiqan klgan nəalaŋ səəɟiq pajwan. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi pajwan ni kaɾi tlug. snħijun ʦuŋʦjaw tjənʦuʦjaw. pnaaħ alaŋ minkwo ** ħŋkawas kndadax (ʦaɾasjwo),(ʦjaɾaa*us)tnħɟil ħini ni pnħjugan kiŋal alaŋ. kika balaj bi alaŋ pajwan. mniq gqijan ħidaw ssijaw jajuŋ mdudul gggijaq, lutuʦ ħunaʦ alaŋ wənɾə, lutuʦ gqijan ħidaw alaŋ kuɾo, daja ħɾaan ħidaw ni ssijaw alaŋ jiɾin. pgkla patas ɾmigaw
S.FORM: = Calasiv = Gaga mniq Pingtung Rayyisyang ka alang Calasiv. 157 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 538 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 514 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 24 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan89%, Amis1%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%. Pusu nniqan alang Hangan Calasiv nii o niqan bi pahung na snaw msa. Nniqan alang Nuysan Pintung nsgan Rayyi alang Calasiv. Nniqan gasuc Ga mniq nsgan ruwan ksska mpitu alang ka alang Calasiv, hunac o lutuc alang Wenre, lutuc alang Rayyi ka hraan hidaw, kssiyaw alang Yirin ka daya hraan hidaw, lutuc alang Kuro ka gqiyan hidaw. Pgkla patas cyawtung Ppanun rulu:Kndadax sngyan rulu qrngul ppanan basu Pingtung quri Rayyi, dhuq do priyux haya musa alang. Quri Pingtung:Tay yi syen-Nsgan Sinpi, quri saw Syangtan, lutuc dgiyaq kungru kika dhuq da. Quri Kawcyung:Nanerkaw-Tucing Nancwo cyawryodaw. Sjiqan klgan nealang Seejiq Paywan. Djiyun kari Kari Paywan ni kari tlug. Snhiyun cungcyaw Tyencucyaw. Pnaah alang Minkwo 42 hngkawas kndadax (Carasywo),(Cyaraafus)tnhjil hini ni pnhyugan kingal alang. Kika balay bi alang Paywan. Mniq gqiyan hidaw ssiyaw yayung mdudul gggiyaq, lutuc hunac alang Wenre, lutuc gqiyan hidaw alang Kuro, daya hraan hidaw ni ssiyaw alang Yirin. Pgkla patas rmigaw
S.PHON: = ʦalasi* = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ ɾajjisjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦalasi*. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, amis*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ ħaŋan ʦalasi* nii o niqan bi paħuŋ na snaw msa. nniqan alaŋ nujsan pintuŋ nsgan ɾajji alaŋ ʦalasi*. nniqan gasuʦ ga mniq nsgan ɾuwan ksska mpitu alaŋ ka alaŋ ʦalasi*, ħunaʦ o lutuʦ alaŋ wənɾə, lutuʦ alaŋ ɾajji ka ħɾaan ħidaw, kssijaw alaŋ jiɾin ka daja ħɾaan ħidaw, lutuʦ alaŋ kuɾo ka gqijan ħidaw. pgkla patas ʦjawtuŋ ppanun ɾulu:kndadax sŋjan ɾulu qɾŋul ppanan basu piŋtuŋ quɾi ɾajji, dħuq do pɾijux ħaja musa alaŋ. quɾi piŋtuŋ:taj ji sjən-nsgan sinpi, quɾi saw sjaŋtan, lutuʦ dgijaq kuŋɾu kika dħuq da. quɾi kawʦjuŋ:nanəɾkaw-tuʦiŋ nanʦwo ʦjawɾjodaw. sɟiqan klgan nəalaŋ səəɟiq pajwan. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi pajwan ni kaɾi tlug. snħijun ʦuŋʦjaw tjənʦuʦjaw. pnaaħ alaŋ minkwo ** ħŋkawas kndadax (ʦaɾasjwo),(ʦjaɾaa*us)tnħɟil ħini ni pnħjugan kiŋal alaŋ. kika balaj bi alaŋ pajwan. mniq gqijan ħidaw ssijaw jajuŋ mdudul gggijaq, lutuʦ ħunaʦ alaŋ wənɾə, lutuʦ gqijan ħidaw alaŋ kuɾo, daja ħɾaan ħidaw ni ssijaw alaŋ jiɾin. pgkla patas ɾmigaw
